zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Woodward Sr.於1603年12月10日出生在英國艾可波金時，他的父親Robert Woodward24歲，母親Joanne Clay16歲。他於大約1627年與Anna Ellen Cheney在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1642年住在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登哈普登普洛斯培可特 希爾 其特利。他去世於1685年3月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Woodward Sr.于1603年12月10日出生在英国艾可波金时，他的父亲Robert Woodward24岁，母亲Joanne Clay16岁。他于大约1627年与Anna Ellen Cheney在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1642年住在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登哈普登普洛斯培可特 希爾 其特利。他去世于1685年3月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Woodward Sr. was born on 10 December 1603, in Bocking, Essex, England, his father, Robert Woodward, was 24 and his mother, Joanne Clay, was 16. He married Anna Ellen Cheney about 1627, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Prospect Hill Cemetery, Hampden, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States in 1642. He died on 9 March 1685, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81.

Il a épousé Anna Ellen Cheney environ 1627, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. ja.Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Peter Woodward Sr.が1603年12月10日にイギリスエセックスボクイングで生まれた時，父Robert Woodwardは24歳，母Joanne Clayは16歳であった。約1627年にイギリスエセックスデドハムでAnna Ellen Cheneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1642年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンハンプデンプロスペクト ヒル セメテリーに住んでいた。彼は1685年3月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクデドハムで81歳で死去した。

ko.Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함
ko.Prospect Hill Cemetery, Hampden, Hampshi: 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 함p든 프로스펙트 힐 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Peter Woodward Sr.(이)가 1603년 12월 10일 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Woodward(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne Clay(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1627년 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Anna Ellen Cheney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1642년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 함p든 프로스펙트 힐 세멧리에서 살았다. 그는 1685년 3월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Woodward Sr. nasceu em 10 de dezembro de 1603, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Woodward, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joanne Clay, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Ellen Cheney aproximadamente 1627, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Prospect Hill Cemetery, Hampden, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1642. Ele faleceu em 9 de março de 1685, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Woodward Sr. родился 10 декабря 1603 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Woodward было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joanne Clay, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Ellen Cheney около 1627 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности проспект хилл кеметири, хампден, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1642 году. Он умер 9 марта 1685 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год.
